name: node-cliui
title: node-cliui
description:
easily create complex multi-column CLIs
Exposes a simple layout Domain Specific Language (DSL), reminiscent
of HTML (with div and span elements) that makes it possible to easily
create command-line-interfaces (CLIs).
.
This package include also jackspeak a very strict argument parser.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-cliui because easily create complex multi-column CLIs.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-cliui as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-cliui with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-cliui --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
